summary: To achieve the highest concentration of oxygen delivery, one should use a device that can precisely control its output; thus, the Venturi mask provides more accurate and higher levels of oxygen than other methods listed. This precision makes it ideal when needing concentrated oxygen therapy without risking excessive dilution from room air.
